title: Senior Frontend Developer at AgroStar Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at AgroStar Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AgroStar Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About AgroStar Global Group:
AgroStar Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar Global Group!
